Press Alt+1 for screen-reader mode, Alt+0 to cancel
Accessibility Screen-Reader Guide, Feedback, and Issue Reporting | New window
Careers
Join the Team

🌟 Join Our Team at Saint Luke’s Place!

💙 Make a Difference with Us

Are you passionate about caring for others and creating a positive impact? At Saint Luke’s Place, we’re always looking for compassionate, dedicated individuals to join our team.

We offer rewarding opportunities in a variety of areas:

🩺 Registered Nurse (RN)

💉 Registered Practical Nurse (RPN)

🤝 Personal Support Worker (PSW)

🧹 Housekeeping

🧺 Laundry Services

🔧 Maintenance

💇 Hairdressing

🎨 Programs & Recreation

🍽️ Foodservice & Nutrition

🗂️ Administration & Clerical

📝 How to Apply

If you’re interested in becoming part of our caring and committed team, please complete the application form on this page.

🚫 Please note: We are unable to accept drop-in applications. All applications must be submitted online or by email to info@stlp.ca

We look forward to hearing from you! 💌



Employment Application

If you would like to apply to be a part of the Saint Luke's Place team, fill out this form, and attach your Resumé and cover letter.
